verses.1: By the rivers of Babylon, there we sat down.
verses.2: On the willows in that land,
verses.3: For there, those who led us captive asked us for songs.
verses.4: How can we sing the LORD’s song in a foreign land?
verses.6: Let my tongue stick to the roof of my mouth if I don’t remember you,
verses.7: Remember, LORD, against the children of Edom in the day of Jerusalem,
verses.8: Daughter of Babylon, doomed to destruction,
